SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.tests

Class BrokerRegistrationTest

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.tests.BrokerRegistrationTest
public class BrokerRegistrationTest extends Object
Component-level unit tests for the Broker's registration API (CDC §3.5).

Because Broker is a BCM component, it requires the BCM lifecycle to be running (RMI registry, executor services, port publication). This test uses a minimal AbstractCVM fixture (BrokerRegistrationTest.BrokerRegistrationCVM) that is started once per class via BeforeClass. All assertions are executed synchronously inside execute() and stored in a static results map; each @Test method then checks the stored result without needing BCM.

The stub client component (StubReceiverComponent) publishes a ReceivingCI inbound port so the Broker's register() can do its port connection without the -ea BCM precondition conflict that occurs when using PluginClient.

Ce qui est testé (CDC §3.5) :

  • register(uri, FREE) returns the publishing port URI; registered(uri) is subsequently true.
  • A second register with the same URI throws AlreadyRegisteredException.
  • register(uri, STANDARD) returns the privileged port URI, which differs from the FREE publishing URI.
  • registered(uri, rc) throws UnknownClientException for an unknown URI (new C.1 contract).
  • registered(uri, FREE) is true when the class matches, false when it does not.
  • unregister removes the client; a second call throws UnknownClientException.

    Nested Classes

    Class
    Description
    static class 
    BrokerRegistrationTest.BrokerRegistrationCVM
    Minimal BCM deployment that drives all registration tests inside BrokerRegistrationTest.BrokerRegistrationCVM.execute() and stores results in results.

    register(uri, FREE) retourne une URI non vide ; registered(uri) vaut true ensuite.
    void

    register(uri, STANDARD) retourne l'URI du port privilégié, distincte de celle retournée pour FREE.
    void

    unregister retire le client ; un second appel doit lever UnknownClientException.

  • Method Details

    • runFixture

      public static void runFixture() throws Exception
      Démarre une fois la fixture BCM avant l'ensemble des @Test de cette classe. La méthode BrokerRegistrationTest.BrokerRegistrationCVM.execute() exécute tous les scénarios synchrones et stocke leurs résultats dans results.
      Throws:
      Exception - si le démarrage de la CVM échoue.

    • testFixtureSetupSucceeded

      public void testFixtureSetupSucceeded()
      La fixture BCM a démarré et résolu le Broker et les deux StubReceiverComponent.

    • testRegisterFreeReturnsPublishingPortAndIsRegistered

      public void testRegisterFreeReturnsPublishingPortAndIsRegistered()
      register(uri, FREE) retourne une URI non vide ; registered(uri) vaut true ensuite.

      public void testRegisterDuplicateThrowsAlreadyRegisteredException()
      Enregistrer deux fois la même URI doit lever AlreadyRegisteredException.

      public void testRegisterStandardReturnsPrivilegedPortUri()
      register(uri, STANDARD) retourne l'URI du port privilégié, distincte de celle retournée pour FREE.
